form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 7 at Canberra Open on April 3 over 1600m, slow going 1.5 len behind Acheson with 61.5kg at $4.60. The start before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 15 at Albury Alburymile Bm90 on March 19 over 1600m, slow going 0.9 len behind Black Storm with 59kg at $10. Well placed. Class runner who is sure to measure up again.
